question: Q4 - Search and video advertising according to the authors have their limitations. Give one example each of how brands have been able to beat their limitations and still use the two platforms successfully? Cite metrics of success.

answers.brand_concept: Non-visual text-only limitation beaten via visual Shopping formats; imprecise targeting beaten via regional contextual video
answers.answer_text:
SEARCH — Overcoming 'Non-Visual, Text-Only' Limitation

Keller (Ch. 7, Table 7-4, p. 283) notes search advertising is 'a non-visual (text-only) ad type [that] can limit what the brand can convey.'

Cadbury Celebrations (Mondelez India) overcame this via Google's Performance Max, which serves visual product listing ads (PLAs) with product images, prices, and store names directly in search results. Google confirms ads with image assets achieve '6% higher CTR on average compared to text-only search ads' [1].

VIDEO — Overcoming 'Targeting May Not Be as Precise'

Keller notes video advertising's limitation: 'targeting may not be as precise.'

Havells India overcame this via its 'Hawa Badlegi' campaign — creating region-specific ad films for North/South Indian markets with culturally resonant themes. Per Exchange4media, '#HawaBadlegi generated immense popularity on social media' [2]. Havells spends 3-4% of sales on advertising vs 1% industry average, delivering strong differentiation [3].

citations.title: About Shopping Ads + Ads Highlights 2025
citations.quoted_text: Shopping ads display a product photo, title, price, store name; advertisers who achieve Excellent Ad Strength see 6% more conversions

citations.title: Havells' move from comedy to social forwardness spells success
citations.quoted_text: Winds of change and Hawa badlegi hashtags have seen immense popularity and participation from people on social media

citations.title: In-Depth Marketing Strategy of Havells India
citations.quoted_text: the company spends about 3-4% of sales on advertising vs just 1% by competitors

answers.brand: Hero MotoCorp (search) + Cadbury Celebrations SRK campaign (video)
answers.brand_concept: Keyword competition beaten via AI Performance Max; distraction beaten via AI-personalized hyper-local video
answers.answer_text:
SEARCH — Overcoming 'Competition for Keywords Drives Up Budgets'

Keller (Ch. 7, Table 7-4, p. 283) identifies 'competition for certain keywords can drive up budgets.' Bidding wars on generic keywords make search prohibitively expensive.

Hero MotoCorp adopted Google's Performance Max with AI-powered Smart Bidding to find cost-effective conversion paths rather than competing head-on. Per Think with Google APAC, this 'enabled the brand to automatically optimize campaigns across Google's ad channels,' resulting in 126,000 store visits and 67,000 phone calls [1].

VIDEO — Overcoming 'Audience May Be Too Distracted to Pay Attention'

Keller notes: 'audience may be too distracted to pay attention.'

Cadbury Celebrations overcame this via radical personalization for Diwali 2021 '#NotJustACadburyAd.' Using AI (Rephrase.ai), 130,000+ personalized video ads featured SRK mentioning each viewer's local store by name. Per Ogilvy: 'Machine learning recreated SRK's face and voice to take local store names' [2]. Result: 94M views, 35% sales growth, Cannes Grand Prix 2023 — India's first Titanium Lion [3].

answers.brand: Berger Paints (search) + Cadbury Celebrations (video — customization angle)
answers.brand_concept: Time-consuming optimization beaten via AI programmatic; no-customization beaten via 130K personalized videos
answers.answer_text:
SEARCH — Overcoming 'Optimization is Time-Consuming'

Keller (Ch. 7, Table 7-4, p. 283) notes 'optimization of a campaign is time-consuming.' Manually adjusting bids, testing copy, refining keywords requires ongoing effort.

Berger Paints India deployed AI-driven mobile ads with dynamic creative optimization — regional targeting and advanced sensors served contextually relevant ads automatically, achieving '24x higher engagement rate' vs standard benchmarks [1]. Plus SEO-driven content (e.g., 'Trending Wall Colours') creates always-on search presence compounding organically [2].

VIDEO — Overcoming 'Customization or Verification is Not Possible'

Keller notes: 'customization or verification is not possible' in video.

Cadbury Celebrations attacked this directly. For Diwali 2021, Rephrase.ai created 130,000+ customized video versions with SRK naming different local stores. NotJustACadburyAd.com enabled store owners to generate their own versions — verification and co-creation. Result: 'localized to 500+ pincodes with 2,500+ businesses' [3], 94M views, 35% sales growth.

citations.quoted_text: Machine learning used to localize campaign to 500+ pincodes with 2,500+ local business owners

answers.brand_concept: Text-only limitation beaten via Performance Max visuals; distraction beaten via shock-humor (Rahul Dravid road rage)
answers.answer_text:
SEARCH — Overcoming 'Non-Visual, Text-Only' Limitation

Keller (Ch. 7, Table 7-4, p. 283) notes search is 'a non-visual (text-only) ad type.' For motorcycles, consumers need to SEE design.

Hero MotoCorp adopted Performance Max serving visually rich formats — product images, Maps listings, YouTube snippets — all triggered by search intent. Per Think with Google, this attracted 126,000 store visits and 67,000 phone calls [1].

VIDEO — Overcoming 'Audience May Be Too Distracted'

CRED overcame distraction via deliberately absurd, shock-humor storytelling. During IPL 2021, the ad showed famously calm Rahul Dravid in road-rage meltdown screaming 'Indiranagar ka gunda hoon main!' — complete persona inversion. Cognitive dissonance arrested attention in first 3 seconds — before the skip button. Per Social Samosa, 'garnered 4M+ YouTube views in four days' and 'trended #1 on Twitter' [2]. CRED reported '700% increase in app downloads' [3].

NOTE: CRED is fintech (not e-commerce) but carries mild risk as an internet brand.

citations.title: Brand Saga: CRED IPL campaign
citations.quoted_text: garnered over 4 million views on YouTube in four days of its release

citations.title: CRED IPL Campaign Analysis
citations.quoted_text: CRED reported 700% increase in app downloads
